mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_skill_version WHERE skill_id=#{skillId} AND version_no=#{versionNo}

SELECT ver.id, ver.skill_id, ver.version_no, ver.provider_config_id, ver.model_code, ver.system_prompt, ver.task_prompt, ver.output_template, ver.forbidden_rules, ver.citation_rules, ver.validation_status, ver.publish_status, ver.score, ver.create_time, bind.base_id, kb.base_name FROM ai_skill_version ver LEFT JOIN ai_skill_kb_binding bind ON bind.skill_version_id = ver.id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = bind.base_id AND kb.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE ver.id = #{id}

SELECT ver.id, ver.skill_id, ver.version_no, ver.provider_config_id, ver.model_code, ver.system_prompt, ver.task_prompt, ver.output_template, ver.forbidden_rules, ver.citation_rules, ver.validation_status, ver.publish_status, ver.score, ver.create_time, bind.base_id, kb.base_name FROM ai_skill_version ver LEFT JOIN ai_skill_kb_binding bind ON bind.skill_version_id = ver.id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = bind.base_id AND kb.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE ver.skill_id = #{skillId} AND ver.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY ver.create_time DESC, ver.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill_version (skill_id, version_no, provider_config_id, model_code, system_prompt, task_prompt, output_template, forbidden_rules, citation_rules, validation_status, publish_status, score, create_time, create_user) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{versionNo}, #{providerConfigId}, #{modelCode}, #{systemPrompt}, #{taskPrompt}, #{outputTemplate}, #{forbiddenRules}, #{citationRules}, #{validationStatus}, #{publishStatus}, #{score}, #{createTime}, #{createUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_skill_version SET provider_config_id=#{providerConfigId}, model_code=#{modelCode}, system_prompt=#{systemPrompt}, task_prompt=#{taskPrompt}, output_template=#{outputTemplate}, forbidden_rules=#{forbiddenRules}, citation_rules=#{citationRules} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE ai_skill_version SET publish_status = CASE WHEN id = #{skillVersionId} THEN 'PUBLISHED' ELSE 'ARCHIVED' END WHERE skill_id = #{skillId}
UPDATE ai_skill_version SET validation_status=#{validationStatus}, score=#{score} WHERE id=#{id}
